title: Mailchimp vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Klaviyo email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which tool suits your business best.
h1: Mailchimp vs Klaviyo: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Both Mailchimp and Klaviyo are popular email marketing platforms, but they cater to different audiences and use cases. Mailchimp excels as an affordable, beginner-friendly all-in-one marketing suite, while Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce automation with advanced analytics. Your choice depends on your business type, budget, and technical needs.
choose_a_if: You're a beginner or small business with a tight budget
You want an all-in-one platform with landing pages and basic marketing tools
You need straightforward email automation without e-commerce complexity
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce
You need advanced segmentation, predictive analytics, and SMS marketing
You're willing to invest more for specialized e-commerce features and customer support

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Mailchimp is better for beginners and small businesses due to its lower cost and simpler interface. Klaviyo is better for e-commerce brands that need advanced automation and predictive analytics. Klaviyo scores higher on customer satisfaction (4.6 vs 4.3 on G2), but Mailchimp's affordability and all-in-one features make it superior for budget-conscious startups.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Klaviyo?
faq.a: Mailchimp is significantly cheaper, starting at $13/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. Both offer free tiers with 500 contacts, but Mailchimp maintains lower pricing across all paid plans. If budget is your primary concern, Mailchimp is the clear winner.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, you can export your contact lists and email templates from Klaviyo and import them into Mailchimp. However, you may lose some advanced automation workflows and e-commerce-specific data. The migration process is straightforward for basic email lists, but you'll need to rebuild complex automations manually.
